Add structured data to high-impression pages.

steps.title: Add FAQ, Article, Breadcrumb, or HowTo schema.

tasks.title: Supporting content (Services Pages)
tasks.goal: Improve semantic relevance / Strengthen ranking signals
tasks.description:
Develop additional content pieces that support primary pages.

Section: B

steps.title: Identify content gaps and Missing Topics around main topic:
Optimize with related entities and keywords.
Link supporting pages to pillar or money pages.

tasks.title: Find New content strategy
tasks.goal: Improve CTR (Click Through Rate) / Increase organic traffic / Capture featured snippets and AI search visibility
tasks.description:
Create a content strategy for pages receiving impressions but low clicks from Google Search Console.

Section: B

steps.title: Identify fresh high-impression, low-click pages in GSC.
Analyze search intent and SERP competitors.
Optimize titles, headings, FAQs, and snippets.

tasks.title: Blog expansion for (Only For Blogs)
tasks.goal: Increase topical authority / Capture long-tail keywords / Improve internal linking opportunities
tasks.description:
Create supporting blog content around existing high-impression pages.

steps.title: Internally link blogs with target pages.

tasks.goal: Improve topical authority / Increase rankings for core service keywords
tasks.description:
Build strong topical relevance around a service area to improve rankings, authority, and organic visibility.

tasks.title: Expand cluster pages ( for 1 Service Page )
tasks.goal: Build semantic relevance / Improve keyword coverage
tasks.description:
Create related cluster pages around the main service topic.

steps.title: Identify subtopics related to the piller page.
Create content briefs for cluster pages.
Add relevant CTAs and internal links.

tasks.goal: Recover lost rankings and traffic / Improve content freshness

Refresh outdated or underperforming content.

steps.title: Identify low-performing pages from Content Pruning Report.

tasks.goal: Increase topical authority / Capture long-tail keywords / Improve internal linking opportunities
